name: Bidsketch API
description: Bidsketch helps you create professional proposals in minutes. The API provides access to manage clients, proposals, proposal sections, fees, templates, and webhooks. Authentication uses HTTP token-based authorization. Rate limited to 100 requests per 20 seconds per token.
